This game is so MUTCH fun I found it 8 days after it got published it’s so fun but barely anybody played it it’s scary and fun I played it with my best friend and made a video about it. Could you maybe add me as a content  creator in the  game please this is my YouTube @SpectacularGorilla. Also I subbed to your channel and @SOFIVR channel maybe you can make me and @ SOFIVR mod great game I love it I also love the song it’s so good Have a good day.
